title: Kyoufu! Zombie Neko
synopsis: The series of "warm and soothing" anime shorts will follow a cat who is suddenly resurrected from the grave, and begins to wander around town. Despite being a zombie, the cat is able to get all the townsfolk to fall in love with it. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

tags.name: Zombie
tags.description: Prominently features reanimated corpses which often prey on live humans and turn them into zombies.

title: Oni no Hanayome wa Taberaretai
titleNative: 鬼の花嫁は喰べられたい
synopsis: The story centers on a human girl named Mashiro, who was saved by the demon chieftain, Shuten Douji. To become his food, she marries him at the age of 17 when she is ready to be eaten. But on the other hand, Shuten Douji loves her deeply and has no intention of using her as food. They misunderstand each other because they love each other too much.

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

title: Shiyakusho
synopsis: A special animated short that released alongside the 20th tankoubon volume celebrating the manga reaching 100 chapters.

tags.name: Afterlife
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the afterlife.

title: Horangi Deureowayo
synopsis: A pleasant and mysterious daily life created by a young couple in the forest and an unidentified child who one day came to them. (Source: Comics Naver, translated) Note: Includes episode 0.

tags.name: Family Life
tags.description: Centers around the activities of a family unit.

tags.name: Parenthood
tags.description: Centers around the experience of raising a child.

tags.name: Ensemble Cast
tags.description: Features a large cast of characters with (almost) equal screen time and importance to the plot.

tags.name: Rural
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the countryside.

tags.name: Kemonomimi
tags.description: Prominently features humanoid characters with animal ears.

title: Kagaku Boukentai Tansar 5
synopsis: In 1999, a special mystery/paranormal investigative unit consisting of five youths is formed. The series uses a mix of real tokusatsu footage (vehicle scenes) and animation (character drama).

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: School's Scary Stories: Hanako-san ga kita!!
titleRomaji: Gakkou no Kowai Uwasa Shin: Hanako-san ga Kita!!
titleEnglish: School's Scary Stories: Hanako-san ga kita!!
titleNative: 学校のｺﾜｲうわさ 新・花子さんがきた!!
synopsis: The story of the anime revolves around Hanako, a girl who lives in a supernatural world apart from our own. Hanako appears when schoolchildren are in trouble; she is a benevolent version of an enduring Japanese urban legend about Hanako, a ghost who lives in a toilet at the local school. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

title: Wu Geng Ji 4 Part 2
titleNative: 武庚纪 第四季 下

title: Hipira-kun Special
synopsis: Last episode of Hipira-kun bundled with the DVD/Blu-ray release.

tags.description: Prominently features a character who is a vampire.

tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Duel Masters LOST: Gekka no Shinigami
titleRomaji: Duel Masters LOST: Gekka no Shinigami
synopsis: Sequel to Duel Masters LOST: Tsuioku no Suishou .

title: Ark
synopsis: Ark takes place on a dying alien world in which a global war between two technologically advanced human civilizations has reduced the planet to a wasteland. The only way to escape the world is by activating the Ark, an ancient giant robot capable of supporting a human city as well as traveling through space. (Source: Wikipedia)

tags.name: Military
tags.description: Centered around the life and activities of military personnel.

title: Dream Tower
synonyms: Dream Tower: The Puzzle of Snow City

title: Warau Salesman Specials
titleNative: 笑ゥせぇるすまん スペシャル
synopsis: Specials of Warau Salesman broadcast intermittently during the main show in half-hour time slots, not included in the episode count of the series.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

tags.name: Work

tags.name: Tragedy
tags.description: Centers around tragic events and unhappy endings.

tags.name: Episodic
tags.description: Features story arcs that are loosely tied or lack an overarching plot.

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

title: Oh! My goddess!
synopsis: Who cares if you’re invisible in high school when you can see and talk to the invisible? Reserved and quiet, Jamie Oh prefers to remain in the background and confide only in his friends, who happen to be ghosts. But when the most popular girl in school takes interest in him, his normal -- or rather, paranormal -- life takes an unexpected turn. (Source: WEBTOONS)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Naniwa Kinyuu Den: Minami no Teiou
titleRomaji: Naniwa Kinyuu Den: Minami no Teiou
titleNative: 難波金融伝 ミナミの帝王
synopsis: The story centers around Ginjirou Manda, a loan shark who charges toichi — 10% more interest every 10 days, or 365% every year. Thanks to his unrelenting money-collecting tactics, he is feared as Minami no Oni or the Demon of Osaka's Minami business district.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Ghost Tale
synopsis: Su and Uh use the power of telekinesis to impress Lah by lifting up objects. Lah then tries to use telekinesis, too, but lacks this power, so Su and Uh help her.

tags.name: Ghost
tags.description: Prominently features a character who is a ghost.

tags.description: One or more characters are experiencing an unrequited love that may or may not be reciprocated.

title: HAKYU HOSHIN ENGI: The Blood of the Koh Family
titleRomaji: Hakyuu Houshin Engi: Kou-ke no Chi
titleEnglish: HAKYU HOSHIN ENGI: The Blood of the Koh Family
titleNative: 覇穹 封神演義 スペシャル・エピソード「黄家の血」
synopsis: Unaired episode bundled with the eighth Blu-ray/DVD volume of Hakyuu Houshin Engi .

title: Kaijuu Sakaba Kanpai!
synopsis: Various monsters from the Ultra franchise visit the "Monster Bar" every evening to drink away their troubles, whether they have fought a good fight against the Ultra heroes that day or if they've been beaten black and blue. The monsters all gather to refresh themselves, to gather their energy, and to come up with more sinister plans for tomorrow. Baltan is the shop manager of the "Monster Bar," his assistants are Dada and Kanegon, and his part-time worker is Pigmon. The bar's regular customers include: Red King, Eleking, Gomora, Gudon, Zetton, King Joe, and Twin Tail. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Parody
tags.description: Features deliberate exaggeration of popular tropes or a particular genre to comedic effect.

hashtag: #怪獣酒場 #怪獣酒場カンパーイ！

title: Ryuuichi Manga Gekijou: Onbu Obake
titleNative: 隆一まんが劇場　おんぶおばけ
synopsis: Born from the beautiful green jade that shines brilliantly, the ghost Onbuu is carefully raised by the grandpa Ojii, the village's number one blacksmith. The series tells short stories based on Japanese folk tales, while Onbuu enjoys the days of playing with Ojoo and the Kan Gon-chan brothers.

title: Nananin no Ayakashi: Chimi Chimi Mouryou!! Gendai Monogatari
titleRomaji: Nananin no Ayakashi: Chimi Chimi Mouryou!! Gendai Monogatari
titleNative: ななにんのあやかし-ちみちみ魍魎!! 現代物語-
synopsis: This show consists of shorts starring 7 characters created and voiced by the voice actors of the variety show "Seiyuu Danshi desu ga...?". The anime will be a slapstick comedy that follows seven spirits that come to the modern world. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: あぐかる PLAY WITH IBARAKI編
synonyms: Agriculture Angel Baraki: Play with Ibaraki
synopsis: Sequel to Agukaru that was streamed on YouTube and niconico. Includes Episode 0: Prologue

title: Shaolin Wuzang
synopsis: Set in the Henan Province of China during the 17th century, three teenagers are sent to a Shaolin Temple to learn the style of Kung Fu against a ruthless Demon, not seen since the Sui Dynasty, who terrorizes the province in order to search for two magic books to create more power and being stronger in world domination. (Source: Wikipedia)
